title: Home row complete: G and H
description: G and H are index-finger reaches that finish the home row
text: gash glass flash hall had has flag sash gala dash gjf hjk had hall
finger_focus: Index fingers reach to G and H

tips.text: G is one key right of F; H is one key left of J — both index reaches
This completes the home row — eight keys plus G and H

tips.hint: Index fingers reach to G and H

tips.text: Real words now: gash, glass, flash, flag

tips.target: had has flag sash gala dash

character_tips.anna: G and H finish the home row — index-finger reaches, then straight back.
character_tips.maxim: Index fingers are strongest, so G and H slot in easily. Home row done.
character_tips.knopych: G + H! 🤖 Home row 100% — index super-reach!
character_tips.klavochka: Two more cozy keys, my dear — G and H ✨
